modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to correct pay for unrecorded hours in previous pay period

full_description_text: An hourly employee has reported that their hours worked during the last pay period were not captured on their timesheet. This oversight has resulted in a need for correction to ensure proper compensation. The request was submitted through the Employee Dashboard on the Experience Portal, indicating the urgency of addressing this payroll discrepancy.
